chunks.text:
GLS University
Faculty of Engineering and Technology
B.Tech(CS&E)
Functions 
1. Write a class Car with:

Attributes: brand, model

A method display_info() that prints brand and model.
2. Create a class Circle with:

Attribute: radius

A method area() that returns the area of the circle.
3. Write a class BankAccount with:

Attribute: balance (default 0)

Methods:
o
deposit(amount) → increases balance
o
withdraw(amount) → decreases balance if enough funds are available
o
get_balance() → returns the current balance
4. Define a class Student with:

Attributes: name, marks (list of integers)

A method average() that returns the average marks.
 5. Calculator
•
Methods:
•
add(a, b) → returns sum
•
subtract(a, b) → returns difference
•
multiply(a, b) → returns product
•
divide(a, b) → retu

s sum
•
subtract(a, b) → returns difference
•
multiply(a, b) → returns product
•
divide(a, b) → returns quotient if b ≠ 0
 6. Employee
•
Attributes: name, salary
•
Methods:
•
get_details() → prints employee’s name and salary

•
apply_raise(percent) → increases salary by given percentage
 7. Library
•
Attributes: list of books (as a list of strings)
•
Methods:
•
add_book(title) → adds a book
•
remove_book(title) → removes a book if it exists
•
display_books() → prints all available books
